name: vibe-kanban-indie
description: Orchestrate vibe-kanban-indie from Claude Code — drive the kanban board and a crew of coding agents through the bundled vibe-kanban MCP server. Ships the vibe-kanban, product-manager, compose-pipeline, answer-questions, knowledge-recall, knowledge-enrich, and release skills, the orchestrator (loop manager), sweeper (per-tick sweep), product (spec), planner, decider, intake, and release subagents, reusable lifecycle prompts, and looped-orchestrator launchers.
